name: research-writing
description: Academic research writing suite combining ARS (deep-research, academic-paper, academic-paper-reviewer, experiment-agent, literature-search) with Nature-Skills (polishing, review, figures, response, paper2ppt). WOS + CNKI literature search with journal-list filtering and Excel export.

interface.shortDescription: Academic research writing suite — deep research, paper writing, peer review, and literature search
interface.longDescription: A comprehensive Codex plugin combining the ARS (Academic Research Skills) suite with Nature-Skills. Includes: deep-research (13-agent research team), academic-paper (12-agent writing pipeline fused with nature-style precision drafting), academic-paper-reviewer (7-agent multi-perspective peer review), experiment-agent (code experiment design), and literature-search (unified WOS + CNKI search with journal-list filtering and Excel export). Plus Nature-Skills for polishing, reviewer assessment, figure creation, rebuttal drafting, and paper-to-slides conversion.
defaultPrompt: Write a paper on the impact of AI on higher education quality assurance
Review this manuscript and provide detailed feedback
Search WOS for recent papers on urban resilience since 2024
